Releases.Name: Manala: Equinox War
Releases.Summary:
A deckbuilding MMO where cheating is legal. It's not an exploit you found, but the cards in your deck. Argue that their armor never covered that spot. Forget to deduct a hit point. Call the safety word on a strike you saw coming. The Frog of the North sees everything, says nothing and sends the bill later.

Combat is a LARP field with a rulebook. Your gear is your deck: every piece of equipment on your body decides which cards you can play. Poison coats your blade before the fight. Potions are cards that spend the real item out of your bag. Every enemy draws its cards from the gear it is carrying: the sword beating you is the sword you are about to take off its corpse.

No levels, no scaling, no big numbers. You have between 5HP and 20HP. 400 rooms, 23 regions, 5 classes, and a seasonal faction war between Light and Darkness.
Releases.Genres: Role-playing (RPG) · Strategy · Turn-based strategy (TBS) · Indie · Card & Board Game
Releases.GameModes: Single player · Multiplayer · Co-operative · Massively Multiplayer Online (MMO)
Releases.SimilarGames: Force of Nature · Miscreated · Savage Lands · Rising World · Battle Brothers · Eternity: The Last Unicorn

Undated.Name: EasyCraft Online

EasyCraft is an online idle RPG set in the world of Valoria, where players take on the role of adventurers tasked with rebuilding a fragmented civilization. Choose from three classes: Warrior, Mage, or Archer, each with three advanced subclasses, and embark on a journey of battles, exploration, and conquest.

The game features real-time turn-based manual combat, automated resource gathering battles, over 200 items with random rarities and attributes, item crafting, resource gathering, equipment enchanting, and durability systems. Explore the Crypt, dangerous dungeons filled with monsters and rare rewards. Interact with NPCs like Doll, Mira, Thalos, and Varen in a village that serves as your base of operations.

Features include guilds with collective abilities, a PvP arena, a player marketplace, a pet system, quests, competitive rankings, real-time chat, daily rewards, and appearance customization. Play directly in your browser or through the desktop application.

Ecliptica, a survival simulator on a distant, merciless planet where everything is subject to the rigid laws of economics, power and nature.

To survive, the colonists must collaborate, trade and compete in a fully simulated, responsive economy that responds to every decision of both players and non-fiction characters (NPC).

Hyperlane Highway is a VR roguelike arcade shooter where your body is the controller. You physically lean to surf a hoverboard through neon faster-than-light transit tunnels. No thumbstick needed, no motion sickness, nothing between your intention and the lane. Kill enemies, build combo, go faster. Die, come back stronger.

You are a Way Rider: a sponsored celebrity operative clearing rogue AI constructs from the galaxy's collapsed FTL network. Every run is a live broadcast. Every death is a media event. Between runs you spend Sponsorship Credits on permanent upgrades in your Ship Hub, ensuring the next ride starts stronger.

Strategic depth comes from a deep roguelike build system. Dual-wield energy weapons and shape each run using 40+ randomised Sponsor Mod cards, stacking synergies like chain lightning, explosive rounds and shield reflection.
